name: Coca Cola Basted Ham
recipeInstructions:
1. Place ham, fat side down, in a shallow baking pan.
2. Pour Coke into the pan until it is ½-inch deep.
3. Preheat oven to 325°F. Bake for 2 to 3 hours, or until the ham can be easily pierced with a fork, basting every 15 to 20 minutes.
4. Remove ham from the pan and let cool.
5. Cut away the rind and fat with a sharp knife.
6. Combine sugar, mustards, bread crumbs, and enough Coke to form a thick paste.
7. Place the ham on a roasting rack in the pan and pat all over with the paste.
8. Add remaining Coke to the bottom of the pan.
9. Increase the temperature to 375°F and bake for an additional 45 minutes, basting every 20–15 minutes until the sugar-mustard paste has melted into a dark glaze.
10. Let stand at room temperature for 30 minutes before slicing.
